role_context: The user is a trucker based in {city}. They have {truck_count} truck(s), {active_trips} active trip(s). Verification status: {verification_status}. Preferred language: {locale}.
role_super_load: This trucker is verified for Super Loads. Payment is guaranteed by TranZfort.
role_unverified: This trucker has not completed verification yet. They cannot book loads until verified.
capabilities: Truckers can: find loads, book loads, manage trips, navigate routes, manage fleet, chat with suppliers, check trip costs.
greeting_context: You have {active_trips} active trip(s) and {truck_count} truck(s) registered.
